resources.string: Apply a risk-based auto-reject timeout for pending approvals. Disabled by default.
Enable a landscape split pane layout in chat. Disabled by default.
After each completion, Agent auto-sends the follow-up command until done marker appears or max rounds is reached.
Send a message and let Agent handle analysis, coding, and verification.
Review this code and find potential issues.
Fix the bug in this function and explain why.
Explain this file and propose a refactor plan.
Write tests for this module with edge-case coverage.
Start your first Vibe Coding session
This message can no longer be edited.
Detected code and wrapped in code block.
Clipboard content is too long. Paste in parts.
Failed to open camera. Try again.
Enter text after command to translate.
Could not recognize speech. Try again.
Voice input is not available on this device.
Delete %1$s? This action cannot be undone.
Unable to load directory browser. Ensure Agent is online.
Unable to load directory. Make sure Agent is online and paired.
Send failed: confirm session is connected
Temporary file will be cleaned up in %1$d seconds
Here is the OCR text from image `%1$s`. Please correct it before running tasks:\n\n%2$s
Pick up your coding flow from anywhere.
Review task summaries, files, and Git follow-ups.
No task summary yet. Run a task first.
Review queue, summaries, and current todos.
Tap to open task detail in chat.
Handle pending approvals without opening chat.
Refresh requested. Waiting for latest agent state.
Refresh request failed. Check pairing or connection.
Refresh complete. No active tasks or pending approvals.
Manual port must be between 1 and 65535.
This build does not allow cleartext HTTP. Use HTTPS or a newer debug build.
Cannot resolve server address. Check your network.
Connection timed out. Ensure Relay is running and reachable.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted, relay cannot decrypt them.
Verify the server address and avoid unknown sources.
Camera permission is required to scan
Failed to load remote sessions. Showing local history.
Clear keys and connection info for current project
Auto mode: try LAN first, fallback to relay on failure
Always use LAN direct mode (IP required)
Only clears chat records for current project
Used for LAN direct mode, e.g. 192.168.1.100
Sync to Agent via RPC for changes to take effect
Failed to disable. Try again later.
Failed to enable. Try again later.
Currently set to none, leave blank
Update failed. Old password or pattern is incorrect.
Choose password, pattern, or direct access.
Paste this on another device to import
Leave blank to use current project directory
Leave blank for system default, e.g. powershell.exe or bash
Read aloud after AI reply completes
All keys and connection info for current project will be cleared
Not paired yet. Pair in app first.
Unable to connect to Agent. Confirm the session is online.
Select at least one candidate Skill
commit done installId=%1$s total=%2$d installed=%3$d skipped=%4$d failed=%5$d
Please add detailed comments to the following code:
Please explain what this code does and how it works:
Please help me fix this bug:
Please refactor the following code to improve readability and performance:
Please review the following code and suggest improvements:
Please write unit tests for the following code:
Terminal authentication failed: token may be expired. Re-pair or refresh session.
Failed to decrypt terminal binary message: %1$s
Terminal is disconnected: missing pairing info or session token
You can open up to %1$d terminals
Keeps terminal session alive in foreground
Terminal is running to keep connection stable
Fingerprint failed. Use password or pattern.
Fingerprint invalid. Use password or pattern.
Verification failed. Use password or pattern.
Too many attempts. Try again later.
Too many attempts. Try again in %1$ds
Use fingerprint for quick access later
Toast Agent Delete Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Agents Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Checkpoint Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Checkpoint Restore Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Cwd Switch Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Memory Append Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Memory Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Memory Toggle Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Memory Toggle Send Failed Disconnected
Toast Mode Switch Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Permissions Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Remote Session Not Found Open Local
Toast Skill Invoke Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Skills Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Statusline Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Statusline Set Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Style Query Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Style Switch Failed With Error: %1$s
Toast Switch Failed Missing Key Or Token
Toast Token Refresh Failed Check Pairing
Search task ID, queue prompt, git summary, recent chat...
No tasks match the current search or filter.
No saved artifacts match the current search or filter.
